system.description: The Battle-Brother stands immovable and indomitable, as if he were made of rock and iron against which foes break like water against a cliff.
system.benefit: The Battle-Brother may spend a Fate Point as a Full Action to adopt a Stalwart Defence. While doing so, he may not move and may not Dodge. He may make a Parry reaction against all successful strikes against him, all Damage he suffers is reduced by 2, and enemies gain no benefits for outnumbering him in close combat. These effects last until he ends the stance or is rendered incapable of fighting.

specialAbilities.name: Stalwart Defence Stance
specialAbilities.description: Spend a Fate Point as a Full Action to enter Stalwart Defence. Cannot move or dodge, but may Parry all strikes, suffer -2 damage, and enemies gain no bonus from outnumbering. Lasts until you choose to end it or are incapacitated.
